h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to struggle with distinguishing headers from values based on semantic word meaning rather than position.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor does not undergo a strategy reversal, instead repeating the same positional rules throughout the exchange.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to, and the dialogue ends immediately after the final learner turn.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to adapt to, and the dialogue ends immediately after the final learner turn.

tutor_adaptive_mechanism.justification: The tutor does not undergo a strategy reversal, instead repeating the same positional rules throughout the exchange.

scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner will continue to systematically label the forces acting on the cart and resolve their confusion about the direction of the surface force.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Both cards reach the same contact. If this surface is the table, leave one contact label on the cart. Choose the card that stays, then read the cart’s labels again.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor responds to the learner's confusion about redundant cards by physically demonstrating their overlap at the contact line and instructing the learner to choose one.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to respond to.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn for the tutor to respond to.

tutor_strategy_reversal.justification: The tutor responds to the learner's confusion about redundant cards by physically demonstrating their overlap at the contact line and instructing the learner to choose one.
